sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ طَرِيقًا جَدِيدًا يَرْبِطُ مَدِينَتَيْنِ كَبِيرَتَيْنِ فِي الشَّمَالِ وَالْجَنُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je otvorila novi put koji spaja dva velika grada na sjeveru i jugu.
sentences.translationEn: The government has opened a new road linking two major cities in the north and south.

sentences.arabic: يَبْلُغُ طُولُ الطَّرِيقِ مِائَةً وَخَمْسِينَ كِيلُومِتْرًا وَيَمُرُّ بِعِدَّةِ قُرًى.
sentences.translation: Put je dugačak sto pedeset kilometara i prolazi kroz nekoliko sela.
sentences.translationEn: The road is one hundred and fifty kilometres long and passes through several villages.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُسَافِرُونَ إِنَّ الرِّحْلَةَ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تَسْتَغْرِقُ أَرْبَعَ سَاعَاتٍ أَصْبَحَتِ الْآنَ سَاعَتَيْنِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Putnici su rekli da je putovanje koje je trajalo četiri sata sada svega dva sata.
sentences.translationEn: Travellers said that the journey that used to take four hours now takes only two.

sentences.arabic: سَيُسَهِّلُ هَذَا الطَّرِيقُ نَقْلَ الْبَضَائِعِ بَيْنَ الْمَدِينَتَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj put će olakšati prijevoz robe između dva grada.
sentences.translationEn: This road will make it easier to transport goods between the two cities.

sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ الطَّرِيقَ سَيُنَشِّطُ الاِقْتِصَادَ الْمَحَلِّيَّ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci smatraju da će put pokrenuti lokalnu ekonomiju.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe that the road will stimulate the local economy.
